scripts.test:unit: vitest run --exclude tests/database-contract.test.ts --exclude tests/security-audit-realtime.test.ts --exclude tests/status-reorder-database.test.ts --exclude tests/history-database.test.ts
scripts.test:database: vitest run tests/database-contract.test.ts tests/security-audit-realtime.test.ts tests/status-reorder-database.test.ts tests/history-database.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:cloud: node e2e/require-cloud-env.mjs && E2E_SUITE=cloud playwright test e2e/cloud.spec.ts
scripts.verify:local: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:public
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify:local && npm run verify:cloud
